description: Determines the specific effect for Death & Necromancy spell types. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the specific effect for Death & Necromancy spell types. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.
